explainability.order_count: How many times the customer ordered this product
explainability.days_since_last: Days since the customer last ordered this product
explainability.avg_quantity: Average quantity the customer orders each time
explainability.order_frequency: How often this product appears in the customer orders
explainability.week_of_year: Seasonal factor based on time of year

fairness_note: Suggestions are based solely on individual customer purchase history. No producer-level features are used, preventing producer bias.
monitoring_strategy: Customer override events are logged. If override rate exceeds 30%, model retraining is recommended. Accuracy is recalculated monthly against actual orders placed.
